meta.description: Background on the organisations and people who appear as donors in the AEC disclosures, so readers can see what the source of a donation actually is. Each record adds a link to the donor's own website or social media and a short, factual description. Keyed by the exact donor name as disclosed to the AEC; the same entity may appear under several spellings.
meta.note: Descriptions are factual and sourced; they describe who the donor is, not any judgement about the donation. Individuals (as opposed to organisations) are generally not profiled.

Mineralogy Pty Ltd.description: Mineralogy is a privately held mining and exploration company, principally involved in iron ore (magnetite) in Western Australia's Pilbara region, founded and owned by businessman Clive Palmer.

Cormack Foundation Pty Ltd.description: The Cormack Foundation is an Australian investment company and registered associated entity of the Liberal Party of Australia (Victorian Division), established in 1988 with proceeds from the sale of Melbourne radio station 3XY.

Pratt Holdings.description: Pratt Holdings Proprietary Limited is the private holding company of the Pratt family's Visy group, a paper, packaging and recycling business; it is controlled by Australian businessman Anthony Pratt, chairman of Visy.

Labor Holdings Pty Ltd.description: Labor Holdings Pty Ltd is a fundraising and investment vehicle registered with the Australian Electoral Commission as an associated entity of the Australian Labor Party (Queensland branch).

Mining and Energy Union.description: The Mining and Energy Union (MEU) is an Australian trade union representing workers in the coal mining and energy industries; it became an independent registered organisation in December 2023 after withdrawing from the CFMMEU.

United Workers Union.description: The United Workers Union (UWU) is an Australian trade union covering more than 150,000 workers across over 45 industries, formed in 2019 from the merger of United Voice and the National Union of Workers.

Cormack Foundation Pty Limited.description: The Cormack Foundation is an Australian investment company and registered associated entity of the Liberal Party of Australia (Victorian Division), established in 1988 with proceeds from the sale of Melbourne radio station 3XY.

LIBERAL PARTY OF AUSTRALIA.description: The Liberal Party of Australia is a major centre-right to right-wing Australian political party, founded in 1944 by Robert Menzies. It operates federally with autonomous state and territory divisions.

Liberal National Party of Queensland.description: The Liberal National Party of Queensland (LNP) is a major conservative political party in Queensland, formed in 2008 by the merger of the state Liberal and National parties. Its federal members sit with either the Liberal or National parties.

Hancock Prospecting Pty Ltd.description: Hancock Prospecting is a privately owned Australian mining and agriculture company founded in 1955 by Lang Hancock, focused on iron ore and other minerals in Western Australia. It is controlled by executive chairman Gina Rinehart.

Australian Capital Equity Pty Ltd.description: Australian Capital Equity (ACE) is the main private investment company of businessman Kerry Stokes, founded in 1980. Fox Group Holdings Pty Ltd.description: Fox Group Holdings is the private holding company of the Fox family, founded by businessman Lindsay Fox. The group's interests include the Linfox transport and logistics business, property, airports and Linfox Armaguard currency management.

Mining & Energy Union.description: The Mining and Energy Union (MEU) is Australia's main trade union for the coal mining and energy sectors, covering mines, power stations and ports. It became a standalone registered union in December 2023 after withdrawing from the CFMEU.

Australian Capital Equity.description: Australian Capital Equity (ACE) is the main private investment company of businessman Kerry Stokes, founded in 1980. Its principal asset is a controlling stake in ASX-listed Seven Group Holdings, with interests across media, resources and other sectors.

NSW LOCAL GOVERNMENT CLERICAL ADMINISTRA.description: Trading as the United Services Union (USU), this is an Australian trade union representing local government, energy, utilities, airlines, clerical and administrative workers across NSW and the ACT. Electrical Trades Union.description: The Electrical Trades Union of Australia (ETU) is a trade union representing electricians, apprentices and electrical workers, operating as a division of the Communications, Electrical and Plumbing Union (CEPU).

Greenfields Foundation.description: The Greenfields Foundation is a financing entity historically linked to the Liberal Party of Australia, established in the mid-1990s in connection with managing party debt following the 1993 federal election.

GSA Capital Pty Ltd.description: GSA Capital (Australia) is a multi-strategy investment and capital management firm based in South Yarra, Victoria, with a portfolio spanning passive investments and operating businesses.

Australian Manufacturing Workers Union.description: The Australian Manufacturing Workers' Union (AMWU), officially the Automotive, Food, Metals, Engineering, Printing and Kindred Industries Union, is an Australian trade union representing workers in the manufacturing and industrial sectors. It is affiliated with the ACTU and the Labor Party.

HEALTH SERVICES UNION NSW.description: The Health Services Union (HSU) is an Australian trade union representing workers in the healthcare and social assistance sectors, including hospital, ambulance, aged care and allied health staff. The NSW branch is part of the national HSU.

The building was sold to superannuation fund ISPT in 2020 with the Nationals remaining as tenants.

SUGOLENA HOLDINGS PTY LTD.description: Sugolena is a private company associated with Sydney property owner and arts philanthropist Isaac Wakil and his late wife Susan, who built their wealth in the clothing trade and a Sydney property portfolio and are major benefactors of the Art Gallery of NSW and the University of Sydney.

CEPU Plumbing Division.description: The CEPU Plumbing Division is the plumbing division of the Communications, Electrical and Plumbing Union of Australia, a federally registered trade union whose plumbing arm represents workers in the plumbing and gasfitting trades.

CPSU PSU Group.description: The CPSU PSU Group is the Public Sector Union group of the Community and Public Sector Union, an Australian trade union representing Commonwealth, ACT and NT government employees and staff of former Commonwealth entities. Gandel Group Pty Ltd.description: Gandel Group Pty Ltd is the privately held Australian property and shopping-centre development company controlled by billionaire retail landlord John Gandel AC, with major holdings including a stake in Melbourne's Chadstone Shopping Centre.

Kin Group.description: Kin Group is the Melbourne-based private investment office (family office) of Raphael and Fiona Geminder; Fiona is a daughter of the late Visy founder Richard Pratt. It invests across manufacturing, packaging, FMCG, technology, financial markets and real estate.

PRATT HOLDINGS PTY LTD.description: Pratt Holdings Pty Ltd, trading as Visy, is the privately owned Australian holding company for the Pratt family's packaging, paper and recycling business, chaired by billionaire Anthony Pratt and founded by his grandfather Leon Pratt in 1948.

Minerals Council of Australia.description: The Minerals Council of Australia (MCA) is the national industry association representing companies in the mining and mining-services sector, undertaking policy advocacy on behalf of Australia's minerals industry.

Australian Greens (The Greens) Inc.description: The Australian Greens are a left-wing green Australian political party, a confederation of state and territory Greens parties, with core values of ecological sustainability, social justice, grassroots democracy, and peace and non-violence.

Australian Manufacturing Workers' Union.description: The Australian Manufacturing Workers' Union (AMWU), formally the Automotive, Food, Metals, Engineering, Printing and Kindred Industries Union, is one of Australia's oldest trade unions, representing workers in manufacturing and related industrial sectors. Meriton Group.description: Meriton is Australia's largest apartment developer, a Sydney-based residential property development and serviced-apartment company founded and owned by billionaire Harry Triguboff.

Australian Greens (SA) Inc.description: The South Australian state branch (Australian Greens SA) of the Australian Greens, a green/progressive political party, formed in 1995 and represented in the SA Parliament and the federal Senate.
